temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A group of students, including a young woman with long brown hair and a young man with dark hair, run frantically through a dark, dilapidated wooden structure. The scene is chaotic and dimly lit, with debris falling around them as they flee from an unseen threat. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a high-stakes, terrifying situation, introducing a group of protagonists who are in immediate danger and trying to escape.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, chaotic orchestral music with heavy percussion and crashing sound effects, creating a sense of intense action and destruction.)
(00:04-00:07) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a striped shirt, looks up with a terrified expression. The scene cuts to a man in a leather jacket, his face obscured by shadow, running through the collapsing structure. He is holding a large, ornate axe over his shoulder. (Storyline: The scene introduces a potential antagonist or key character, the man with the axe, and heightens the tension by showing the terrified reactions of the students.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Shouting, panicked. 2) Background sounds or music: The intense, dramatic music continues, punctuated by the sounds of crashing wood and shouting.)
